subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who bestoweth through His command His grace upon whomsoever He willeth. Say: verily, the ultimate victory belongeth unto the God-fearing. We have indeed read the Book which We revealed by God's leave, and We learned of the mention of Abraham's name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسمه العلی العظیم. الحمد لله الذی یمن علی من یشاء بامره قل ان العاقبة للمتقین و لقد قرئنا کتاب الذی نزلنه باذن الله و علمنا بذکر اسم ابراهیم
subcodes.subjects: @Moses, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
